basic_details.job_title: PAU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 15 July 2026 on the official website of PAU. A total of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) vacancy has been announced through the PAU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. in Agriculture/ Biotechnology/ Biosciences, M.Sc. in Agriculture/ Biotechnology/ Biosciences
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: B.Sc. in Agriculture/ Biotechnology/ Biosciences with minimum OCPA 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks. M.Sc. in Agriculture/ Biotechnology/ Biosciences with minimum OCPA 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks & at least two years of post M.Sc Research/ Teaching experience. Must have passed GATE/CSIR-UGC_NET/ARS-NET/DBT-BET or equivalent national level test (Ph.D exempt). Desirable: experience with rice crop/field activities/Genome editing/Plant tissue culture techniques/bioinformatics/data handling.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PAU Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PAU Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
PAU Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: B.Sc. in Agriculture/ Biotechnology/ Biosciences with minimum OCPA 6.00/10.00 basis or 60% marks. M.Sc. in Agriculture/ Biotechnology/ Biosciences with minimum OCPA 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks & at least two years of post M.Sc Research/ Teaching experience. Must have passed GATE/CSIR-UGC_NET/ARS-NET/DBT-BET or equivalent national level test (Ph.D exempt). Desirable: experience with rice crop/field activities/Genome editing/Plant tissue culture techniques/bioinformatics/data handling.

PAU Junior Research Fellow Age Limit 2026
PAU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
PAU Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.pau.edu. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Junior Research Fellow post at Punjab Agricultural University is 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Sc. in Agriculture/ Biotechnology/ Biosciences with a minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 or 60% marks, and an M.Sc. in Agriculture/ Biotechnology/ Biosciences with a minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks, along with at least two years of post-M.Sc. research/teaching experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age relaxation details for reserved categories. It is advisable to refer to the detailed notification for this information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs 37,000/- per month plus 18% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow vacancy?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the PAU Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 200/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does the candidate need to have cleared any national-level test?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have passed GATE/CSIR-UGC_NET/ARS-NET/DBT-BET or an equivalent national-level test. Ph.D. holders are exempt from this requirement.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University, www.pau.edu.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow post announced by Punjab Agricultural University.
